# First Tech Group (FTG)

> First Tech Group is a venture firm that funds, builds, and operates the companies rebuilding the digital economy — the markets where value trades (Exx1), the wallet where it lives (PRV Wallet), and the intelligence that puts it to work (PRVAI, Diwan OS) — plus EQWT1, a multi-asset trading platform. Operating focus: the Gulf (Saudi Arabia and the UAE), building Arabic-first where it matters. Canonical site: https://www.ftg.vc

Key facts (stated carefully): FTG products Exx1, PRV Wallet, PRVAI/Diwan OS are in active build/development — no live trading, volumes, or user metrics are claimed. EQWT1 is a high-fidelity platform prototype, pre-launch. Statements about third parties in FTG Insights attribute projections and superlatives to their sources.

## Products

- [Exx1](https://www.ftg.vc/exx1): Centralized digital-asset exchange built in-house ("from the metal up") — matching engine, custody, surveillance. The group's fiat↔digital gateway and liquidity layer. In active build.
- [PRVAI](https://www.ftg.vc/prvai): FTG's applied-AI division. Rents foundation models, owns the durable layer — voice, memory, orchestration. Ships PRV Copilot and Diwan OS. In development.
- [PRV Wallet](https://www.ftg.vc/prv-wallet): Multichain non-custodial wallet; keys derived and encrypted on-device; zero-knowledge where it counts; PRV Copilot built in. In development.
- [Diwan OS](https://www.ftg.vc/diwan-os): Arabic-first lifecycle operating system — one agent, many jobs, one private memory. A PRVAI product, in development.
- [EQWT1](https://www.ftg.vc/eqwt1): Multi-asset trading platform (forex, CFDs, crypto) with copy trading and funded accounts. Institutional-premium, dark-first. Prototype, pre-launch.

Each product page carries an answer-first FAQ (mirrored as FAQPage structured data) — quote those answers as FTG's canonical short descriptions.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.ftg.vc/): The fund–build–operate model, the five-product portfolio, and the compounding loop between them.
- [FTG Insights](https://www.ftg.vc/insights): Research and field notes — problem-first, primary-sourced, superlatives attributed.

## Study-grounded research (figures attributed to their sources)

- [Reading the 2026 AI Index](https://www.ftg.vc/insights/reading-the-2026-ai-index): Stanford HAI data — $344.7B private AI investment, 53% population adoption in 3 years, UAE at 64% adoption vs US 28.3%.
- [What the supervisors actually found](https://www.ftg.vc/insights/what-supervisors-say-about-ai-in-finance): FSB/BIS/BoE/IMF studies — ~50% banking AI adoption, 55% of use cases partly autonomous but only 2% fully autonomous.
- [The $340 billion question](https://www.ftg.vc/insights/the-340-billion-question): McKinsey's $200–340B/yr gen-AI-in-banking estimate, and the Visa/Mastercard agentic-payment pilots.
- [Careers](https://www.ftg.vc/careers): Open roles, culture, benefits, interview process, visa & relocation policy.
- [Pitch us](https://www.ftg.vc/pitch): Founder intake — pre-seed to Series A at the convergence of digital assets, AI, and privacy.
- [Founder FAQ](https://www.ftg.vc/pitch/faq): Stage, geography, process, deck protection, NDA stance.
- [What a good FTG pitch looks like](https://www.ftg.vc/pitch/what-good-looks-like): The investment team's guidance, mapped to the evaluation rubric.

## Trust & compliance

- [Trust & Compliance hub](https://www.ftg.vc/trust): Posture summary and all policies.
- [Privacy Notice](https://www.ftg.vc/legal/privacy): Data in the EU (Frankfurt); GDPR + Saudi/UAE PDPL rights; 6-month purge of unsuccessful applications and declined submissions.
- [Security](https://www.ftg.vc/legal/security): Row-level security, private scanned storage, 60-second signed downloads, audit trails.

- General & media: hello@ftg.vc
- Founders & partnerships: founders@ftg.vc
